issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO|Counter' (activates on KO OR opponent's effect removal), not just 'OnKO'. Card explicitly states 'removed from the field by your opponent's effect or K.O.'d'
Condition is 'Always' but should include 'HasCardOnBoard' (Dressrosa type Character) AND hand count check (5 or less cards). Current condition does not verify prerequisites.
Missing duration. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not implicit Permanent.
DSL is missing the passive effect: 'All of your {Dressrosa} type Characters with a cost of 2 or more gain +1 cost.' This is a permanent static ability and must be included as a separate effect.
